description: Accounts of expenditures ("kharaja...") in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Many names mentioned, including: Maḥāsin, Sulaymān, Ḥarīrī, Abū l-Munā, ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz, ʿUmar al-Musaqqī, Sālim, al-ṭaḥḥānīn (the millers), [...] b. al-Fākhūrī, al-sharābī al-Yahūdī. Also various colors (dyed fabric?). There are also a few lines of Hebrew pen trials (Genesis 1:1).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
